A browser extension to help focus on what needs to be done and motivate you to get there

A browser extension that actively helps you rebalance, refocus, and recenter. You may not know how much time you are spending on Reddit when you mindlessly click over "for just a minute". They add up, and there are big context switching costs too. Recenter helps you understand where your time's being spent. More importantly, recenter actively reminds you, and nudges you into doing the right thing.

Recenter's code is open-source to ensure transparency and safety. You can access the code repository from our website https://recenter.netlify.app/

ETab - Chrome Extension for Manage Tab Easily.
Chrome Extention for Manage Tab Easily.
Quickly access tabs, bookmarks, history, and context-aware actions through a command-palette.

Key features:
- Quickly switch between tabs
- Fuzzy search bookmarks
- Fuzzy search history
- Context-aware actions
- Favorite frequently accessed items
- Theming

Default shortcut: Ctrl + Shift + K (or Command + Shift + K on macOS)
Extension shortcut can be customized via chrome://extensions/shortcuts.
LaunchTab New Tab - Transform Your Browser into a Tablet
LaunchTab - Transform your browser into a tablet with a new tab page. Experience the ultimate tab operation with drag-and-drop…

LaunchTab is a brand-new, meticulously crafted modern new tab extension.
Inspired by the free-form icon arrangement design of iOS 18, it provides an ultimate drag-and-drop experience, whether you're adjusting positions or merging folders.
Moreover, it offers a wide range of appearance-related settings, allowing you to customize your tab page to your heart's content.

More excellent features:
1.Flexible drag-and-drop, layout
freedom Redefine your workspace with flexible drag-and-drop interaction. Easily adjust layouts, support free arrangement, and create the most suitable operating environment for yourself.

2.Convenient folder management
The folder function makes shortcut management more convenient and efficient. Quickly organize and access solutions with simple operations, making your work and life more organized.

3.Excellent built-in apps
Built-in clock, search, notes, and other excellent apps. Conveniently handle daily high-frequency demands, efficient and easy to use. More excellent apps are coming soon.

4.Quick Dock bar, rapid access
The bottom Dock bar design is thoughtful, allowing you to place frequently used shortcuts within it. One-click access, greatly improving operation efficiency, and more intuitive.

5.Personalized appearance settings
Rich appearance customization options, allowing you to adjust the interface style according to your personal preferences. Whether it's color, layout, icons, or wallpaper, you can satisfy your pursuit of individuality and create a unique usage experience.

6.Automatic data synchronization, anytime, anywhere
Seamless data synchronization across multiple devices, allowing you to access and update data instantly, no matter where you are. Keep your devices and browsers in sync.

Data Plug 검색 기능, 추천 정보에 Chrome Browser 방문 기록을 연동합니다.
브라우저에서 여러가지 SaaS들의 문서 정보를 한 눈에 확인하기 가장 좋은 선택입니다.

Data Plug는 당신이 사용하는 SaaS들의 문서 정보를 Chrome에서 통합 검색 / 열람하기 위해서 가장 좋은 방법입니다. 이제 업무 정보를 올-인원으로 관리하세요.

이 확장 프로그램을 사용하면 Chrome으로 과거에 열람한 SaaS들의 문서 정보들과 기타 업무에 필요한 웹 사이트 정보들을 빠르게 검색하고 열람할 수 있도록 분류할 수 있습니다.

Data Plug에 대해 자세히 알아보기: [https://dataplug.info](https://dataplug.info/)

______________________________________________

Data Plug Chrome 확장 프로그램 사용 방법

1. Chrome용 Data Plug 확장 프로그램을 설치합니다.
2. Data Plug 회원 가입을 합니다.
3. Data Plug 서비스 홈 화면에서 검색 / 추천 정보들을 확인합니다.

특징들

검색 기능

- 생각나는 단어나 제목을 검색해보세요. 업무 과정에서 공유 받았거나, 읽어 본 문서 정보 혹은 웹 사이트를 빠르게 찾을 수 있습니다.

내게 관련있는 SaaS 정보들

- Notion, Figma, Trello, Google Drive, Zapier를 포함한 총 19가지의 SaaS들의 읽어 본 문서 정보를 분류하여 제공합니다. 각 SaaS 별로 필요한 문서 정보를 빠르게 목록으로 확인할 수 있습니다.

자주보는 웹사이트

- 자주 방문하는 웹 사이트 정보를 항상 최신 상태로 업데이트합니다. 자주 확인하는 업무 정보, 웹 사이트를 빠르게 확인하는데 도움을 줍니다.

최근에 방문한 웹사이트

- 최근에 방문한 웹 사이트 정보를 항상 최신 상태로 업데이트합니다. 최근에 확인한 업무 정보, 기타 업무에 필요한 웹 사이트를 빠르게 확인하는데 도움을 줍니다.

지원

[support@dataplug-biz.com](mailto:support@dataplug-biz.com) 에서 언제든지 연락하시면 가능한 빨리 회신하여 도움을 드리겠습니다.

자세한 정보

확장 프로그램을 설치하면 Data Plug의 서비스 이용 약관 및 개인 정보 보호 정책에 동의합니다.
Organize your tabs with this extension.

Tired of having a cluttered tab bar in your browser? Say hello to Tab Organizer – the perfect tool to streamline and declutter your open tabs in Google Chrome. With Tab Organizer, you can effortlessly find, group, sort, and close tabs based on your unique requirements.

Key Features:

Select Tabs with Ease: The "Select Tabs" feature allows you to effortlessly choose multiple tabs, making it a breeze to organize them according to your preference.

Streamlined Tab Deletion: The "Delete Selected Tabs" function simplifies the process of closing tabs in bulk, helping you maintain a tidy workspace.

Search and Sort: Easily find specific tabs by searching for keywords. Plus, with the ability to sort your tabs, you can enjoy a well-organized browsing experience.

Group by Domain: Tab Organizer intuitively groups tabs by domain, helping you quickly locate and manage related content.

Most Visited Highlight: Identify your most visited websites within the past week, making it convenient to prioritize your frequently accessed pages.

Tab Organizer is the ideal companion for anyone seeking an enhanced tab management experience in Google Chrome. Take control of your browsing and keep your digital workspace tidy with ease.

Privacy Assurance: Our extension does not collect or transmit any user data. Your browsing activity remains private.
标签页面的历史浏览次数排行榜

标签页面的历史浏览次数排行榜

功能特性：
1、统计浏览次数：扩展会根据用户的浏览历史，统计每个标签页面或网站的访问频率，并生成一个清晰的排行榜。
2、排序功能：用户可以根据时间范围（1-6天）查看访问最多的网页或网站，帮助他们快速定位常用页面。
3、隐私保护：所有的浏览次数统计都在用户设备本地进行，数据不会被上传或分享，确保用户的隐私安全。
Squash - Browser Memory for AI Tools
Squash adds an invisible memory layer to your browser, compressing every click into portable context for any AI agent

Ever wish ChatGPT remembered what you were doing? Squash makes it happen. It learns about you from your browser and distills that into a private, on-device memory.

Then, when you open an AI tool, a single shift-click drops in perfect context. No more blank-slate chats, no more copy-paste chaos. Just AI that shows up like it's been paying attention. No spying, no bloat—just pure, spicy telepathy for your workflow.

Transform Every AI Chat Into a Continuation, Not a Cold Start

Squash creates an intelligent memory layer for your browser. It analyzes your browsing patterns to understand who you are and what you're working on, then seamlessly injects this context into ChatGPT and Claude conversations.

🧠 How It Works

1. Smart Analysis - Squash uses Chrome's built-in AI to analyze your browsing history locally, identifying patterns and building a comprehensive profile
2. Living Context - Maintains both stable traits (who you are) and dynamic context (what you're working on now)
3. One-Click Integration - Adds a context button directly to ChatGPT and Claude interfaces for instant context injection

🔒 Privacy First

- 100% Local Mode - Uses Chrome's Gemini Nano for on-device analysis. Your data never leaves your browser
- Optional Cloud - Connect your own API keys (Claude/Gemini) for enhanced analysis if desired
- URL Sanitization - Strips tracking parameters and sensitive data automatically

Open Source & Transparent

Fully open source on GitHub. Audit the code, contribute features, or fork it. We believe privacy tools should be transparent.
https://github.com/kstonekuan/squash-browser-memory

---
Install Squash today and give your AI conversations the context they deserve. Because AI that knows you is AI that can actually help you.

🚀 Your browser's command center. Find anything, do everything, never leave the keyboard.

A browser extension that displays the number of times you've visited a website. Privacy first, local storage based.
Instantly switch to a preloaded tab with a secret key.

Stealth Tab is your instant escape hatch for Chrome—slip into a study-safe space or snap back to productivity with a single, stealthy keypress. Preload a hidden, muted window with your most trusted sites, summon it in a heartbeat, and quietly glide back to where you were without breaking your focus—or raising eyebrows.

Lightning-fast tab swaps: Assign a single secret key to instantly teleport from your current page to a preloaded destination. Double-tap to reopen the tab you hid, right in its original spot.
Hidden window, zero noise: Stealth Tab keeps your chosen site ready inside a minimized, muted window. Close it by accident? The extension quietly recreates it for you.

Personalized destinations: Stick with one go-to site or rotate through a curated list. Random mode dedupes and shuffles entries so you never land on the same page twice unless you want to.
Instant Lock Mode: One press hides every tab in the current window, swaps in a believable decoy URL, and restores the full lineup—pins, mute states, ordering, active tab—when you trigger it again.

Multi Mode multitasking: Capture endless tabs with a stash key, bring them all back at once with a restore key, and let Stealth Tab remember exact window placement. Chrome system pages are skipped for safety.

Site Lock protection: Block distracting websites behind a PIN. When you visit a locked domain, a fullscreen overlay demands your 4–8 digit code before you can proceed. Unlock lasts only for that tab—close it and the lock snaps back. PINs are SHA-256 hashed and stored locally, never synced or transmitted.

Smart key capture: Dedicated listeners run on every site and frame while respecting text inputs, password fields, and IME composition, so hotkeys only fire when you actually mean it.
Popup control center: The minimalist toolbar popup lets you tweak your secret key and URLs, or reroute you to the full settings if you still need to accept the privacy policy.

Full-featured options hub: Configure modes, lock keys, decoy URLs, Site Lock domains, PIN management, and more from an accessible, keyboard-friendly settings page. All assets are local, so it loads instantly even offline.

Privacy-first design: No accounts, analytics, or remote calls. Settings live in chrome.storage.sync; Site Lock data stays in chrome.storage.local (device-only); session state lives in chrome.storage.session; optional history wipe scrubs the tab you just hid from your local history. A built-in policy modal ensures you read and re-accept any updates.

Resilient service worker: Background logic survives Chrome restarts, prevents duplicate hidden windows, and queues actions so rapid key presses never collide.

Upgrade your tab game. Whether you're juggling lecture notes, client dashboards, blocking tempting distractions, or just need a quick decoy, Stealth Tab keeps your most important pages one stealthy tap away.
Searchery — Universal Search for Your Browser
Searchery — browser extension for instant search of the web, history and bookmarks using the Shift+Space hotkeys.

Searchery – Spotlight-Style Browser Search: Web, History & Bookmarks

⚡ Lightning-fast keyboard launcher for web, history, bookmarks, and tabs — with @-commands and instant engine switching.

Searchery is a free Chromium extension that pops up a compact command palette on any page. Search the web, your history and bookmarks, switch engines on the fly, and control tabs — all from the keyboard.

⚡ Why Searchery?
Stop clicking through menus and switching tabs. One hotkey summons a unified search that works across the web, your browsing data, and verticals — right where you are.

🌐 Core Features & Benefits

📍 Hotkeys
Open Searchery with Shift+Space (customizable: Alt+Space, Ctrl+Space, Ctrl+K, etc.).

📍 @-Commands
@this — search the current site
@find — instant on-page find and highlight
@images, @news, @videos, @maps — vertical search by category

📍 Search Engine Picker
Use the system default or switch between Google, Yandex, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave right in the popup.

📍 Smart Suggestions
Suggestions from your own query history for the last 90 days plus optional clipboard hints.

📍 Recent Tabs Carousel
Quickly flip through recently opened pages with icons, titles, and instant jump.

📍 Bookmark Search
Built-in viewer with instant filtering inside the popup.

📍 Tab Control
Enter — open or search
Shift+Enter — open in a new tab
Ctrl+Enter — keep focus on the current tab

📍 Themes
System, light, or dark. Smooth UI with keyword highlighting and autocomplete.

📍 New Tab Override
Optionally replace the browser’s New Tab page with your chosen engine’s home page.

📍 Privacy
Works locally, no registration, no third-party accounts.

💡 Who Searchery Is For

👨‍💻 Productivity power users and developers: a universal command line for your browser.
📈 Marketers and researchers: fast verticals and site-level searches on competitors.
🎓 Students and analysts: instant history recall, handy commands, and on-page find.
🏎️ Anyone who values speed: less mouse, more results.

🚀 Why Users Choose Searchery

✅ Instant access from one hotkey
✅ Unified interface for web, history, bookmarks, and tabs
✅ Flexible engine and vertical switching on the fly
✅ Local operation and no signup

🧩 How It Works

1️⃣ Press Shift+Space (or your custom hotkey)
2️⃣ Type a query or command (@this, @find, @images, etc.)
3️⃣ Pick a search engine — system, Google, Yandex, Bing, DuckDuckGo, or Brave
4️⃣ Use Arrow keys or Tab to accept suggestions and autocomplete
5️⃣ Press Enter to go; Shift+Enter opens in a new tab

💬 What Makes Searchery Unique

A Spotlight-style command palette for your browser that unifies web, history, and bookmark search with powerful @-commands for site-only and on-page search — all optimized for keyboard-first speed.

⚙️ Use Cases

🧭 Quick site-only search with @this
🖼️ Image, 📰 News, 🎬 Video, 🗺️ Maps verticals
✨ On-page find and highlight with @find
🔄 Jump back via the recent-tabs carousel
🔖 Instant bookmark access with live filtering

⭐ Get Started Now

Install Searchery, set your favorite hotkey, and turn your browser into a fast, universal command search with smart suggestions.

Below is a feature list for a browser extension that includes functionalities for managing and handling multiple tabs:

1. Clear…

Below is a feature list for a browser extension that includes functionalities for managing and handling multiple tabs:

1. Clear tab list: Provides a clear list of all open tabs, categorizing websites with the same domain name.

2. Search bar: Offers a search bar to quickly and accurately search for tabs, enabling fast access to desired webpages.

3. Bookmarking and syncing: Provides bookmarking and syncing functionality to save and sync your favorite webpages and bookmarks.

4. Tab editing: Allows editing operations on each tab or window, enabling quick deletion or bookmarking of a group or individual webpage.

5. Window renaming: Supports renaming different windows for better organization and classification of various window functionalities.

6. Right-click menu functionalities:
   - Add to "Read Later": Adds the current webpage to a "Read Later" list for convenient access when you have time, and allows marking the webpage as completed and removing it later.
   - Add to notepad: Adds selected keywords to a notepad for handling the content when you have time, and allows marking the webpage as completed and removing it later.

7. Custom webpage groups: Supports creating and naming webpage groups for specific scenarios, allowing one-click access to these predefined groups to meet specific browsing needs.

These functionalities aim to provide a more convenient and efficient tab management and browsing experience, helping you better organize Browser Window and Tab Management.


方便快捷的访问所有已打开的浏览器窗口和选项卡
使用登录功能，方便将您的收藏、记事本、稍后再看和自定义网页组的功能在不同设备中同步（我们不会将您的信息用在除此插件之外的功能）

如何使用Tabs Manager  && 功能列表:
~ 所有打开选项卡的清晰列表，并根据域名收纳了所有同域名网站，方便您更快捷地处理这些网页
~ 使用搜索栏快速准确的搜索选项卡
~ 对选项卡进行收藏同步书签（您也可以取消同步书签）
~ 每个选项卡或窗口都是n可编辑的，您可以快速删除或收藏一组/一个网页
~ 支持对不同窗口进行重命名，帮助您更好的整理不同窗口的功能分类
~ 右键菜单-“添加稍后再看”：将当前网页加入稍后再看，方便您在闲暇时访问这些网页，并且后续可以将网页状态勾选为已完成并删除它
~ 右键菜单-“添加记事本”：将网页中选中的关键词加入记事本，方便您闲暇时处理这些内容，并且后续可以将网页状态勾选为已完成并删除它
~ 自定义网页组：支持您增加特定场景的一组网页并命名保存，方便您在需要时或者打开浏览器一键打开这些网页组

欢迎您使用或提出改进性建议
高配当株投資支援ツール - プロフェッショナル版

【ベータ版として公開中：フィードバックを募集中です】

現在、本ツールはパブリック・ベータ版として公開しています。不具合のご報告・ 「ここが使いにくい」「この指標も欲しい」などのご意見があれば、ぜひフィードバックをお寄せください。皆様の声をもとに、ツールの改善をしていきます。

🚀 使い方
ページを開く: 分析したい企業の決算ページ（単独/連結決算推移などのページ）へアクセスします。

データを読み取る: ページ内に自動的に表示される「データを読み取る」ボタンをクリックします。 （※ツールがページの情報を安全にスキャンします）

レポートを確認する: ブラウザ右上の拡張機能アイコンをクリックし、管理画面内の「レポートを表示」ボタンを押してください。 瞬時にランク判定や詳細グラフが表示されます。

【高配当株分析の「質」と「効率」を、マナーを守って最大化する】

「Cashflow Maker Pro」は、国内の著名な株情報サイトで閲覧中の決算ページを瞬時に解析し、プロレベルの財務分析レポートを作成するChrome拡張機能です。

単なるデータ収集ツールではありません。 「アクセス先のサーバーに負荷をかけない」という倫理的な設計思想と、「機関投資家レベルの厳格な判定ロジック(v3.0)」を兼ね備えた、個人投資家のための強力なパートナーです。

数字の羅列を目で追う時間はもう必要ありません。 あなたが銘柄ページを開いた瞬間、その企業が「金の卵」か「罠銘柄」か、このツールが客観的なスコアで答えを出します。

🛡️ サイトとユーザーを守る「セーフティ設計」
本ツールは、従来のスクレイピングツールとは一線を画し、Webサイトの利用規約とサーバー負荷に最大限配慮した設計を採用しています。

完全なユーザー主導型分析: バックグラウンドでの自動巡回や、大量のページへの同時アクセス機能は一切搭載していません。あくまで「ユーザーが現在手動で閲覧している1ページ」の情報のみを読み取り、分析します。

サーバー負荷ゼロ: 追加の通信を行わず、既に画面に表示されているHTMLデータを利用して計算を行うため、サイト側のサーバーに新たな負荷をかけません。

人間らしい挙動: あくまで人間の「読む」という行為を補助（可視化）するツールとして機能します。

📊 搭載ロジック：WDQS Model v3.0
本ツール最大の特徴は、独自の厳格なスコアリングモデル「Weighted Dividend Quality Score (WDQS)」です。 表面的な配当利回りだけに惑わされないよう、企業の「基礎体力」を100点満点で採点し、さらに柔軟な救済措置を組み合わせることで、真の優良企業を浮き彫りにします。

1. 基礎スコア (Quality Score) 算出ロジック [計100pt]
企業の「稼ぐ力」「財務の安全性」「株主への還元姿勢」の3本柱を多角的に評価します。

A. 収益性・成長性 (計 45pt) 企業のエンジン部分を評価します。

EPS (1株当たり利益) [25pt]: 最重要指標。5年前と比較して右肩上がりであれば満点。直近赤字や20%以上の大幅減益は厳しくペナルティ(-10点)を科します。

営業利益率 [10pt]: 本業で効率よく稼げているか。「業種別目標値（例: 情報通信なら10%、卸売なら2%など）」または「全体基準(5%)」をクリアしているかを判定。

売上高 [10pt]: 企業の規模が縮小していないか。5年前と比較して成長トレンドにあるかを評価します。

B. 財務健全性 (計 20pt) 倒産リスクや減配リスクを測ります。

自己資本比率 [10pt]: 80%以上で満点。「鉄壁」の財務基盤を持つ企業を高く評価します（金融業は特例としてEPSに加算）。

財務・キャッシュフロー複合 [10pt]:

営業キャッシュフローが10年以上連続黒字か？（粉飾決算の排除）

現金等は積み上がっているか？

C. 株主還元姿勢 (計 35pt) 投資家への利益還元実績を評価します。

配当推移 [20pt]: 過去12年間の実績を分析。「減配なし（非減配）」かつ「増配傾向」にある企業を最高評価。2回以上の減配は0点となります。

配当性向 [15pt]: 無理な配当を出していないか。最もバランスの良い「30%〜50%」を満点とし、高すぎる場合（70%以上）は減点対象とします。

2. 独自の「救済措置 (Bailout)」システム
機械的なスコアリングの弱点を補うため、人間の投資家判断に近い柔軟なロジックを搭載しています。

例: 「配当性向が高いからダメ」と即断しない 配当性向が70%を超えていても、自己資本比率が60%以上ある企業であれば、「潤沢な内部留保を取り崩して株主還元している（余力あり）」とみなし、ランク降格を免除します。

🏆 ランク判定基準
算出されたスコアに基づき、投資判断を5段階で格付けします。

Sランク (Gold) 👑 買い増し検討

基礎スコア 80点以上

かつ割安（配当1円コスト30円以下、PER 15倍以下、PBR 1.5倍以下）

コメント: 財務・業績ともに完璧に近い、ポートフォリオの核となる銘柄。

Aランク (Blue) 🔷 継続保有

基礎スコア 65点以上

コメント: Sランクの条件には届かないが、安心して長期保有できる優良銘柄。

Bランク (Yellow) 🟡 保有維持

基礎スコア 50点〜64点

コメント: 特段の問題はないが、S/Aランクに比べると成長性や財務で劣る。

Cランク (Orange) ⚠️ 要精査

基礎スコア 50点未満、または「注意シグナル」点灯

注意シグナル例: 高配当性向（70%超）、低収益性（利益率業界平均以下）

コメント: 配当利回りが高くても、将来の減配リスクが潜んでいる可能性があります。

Dランク (Red) ⛔ 投資不適格

基礎スコア 30点未満、または「致命的欠陥」あり

致命的欠陥例: 営業CFの恒常的な赤字（CF枯渇）、財務危険水域

コメント: 非常にリスクが高い状態です。投資は慎重に判断してください。

🔒 プライバシーポリシー & セキュリティ
お客様の大切な投資情報を守るため、最高レベルのプライバシー保護設計を採用しています。

完全ローカル保存 取得・分析したデータ、およびお客様が入力したメモや履歴は、すべてお客様のブラウザ内（Chrome Local Storage）にのみ保存されます。

外部送信なし 分析データを開発者のサーバーや第三者の分析機関へ送信・収集することは技術的に不可能であり、一切行いません。

不要な権限の排除 「閲覧中のタブへのアクセス」など、ツール動作に必要最低限の権限のみを使用しています。

【免責事項】 本ツールは、公開されている財務データに基づき機械的に計算を行った結果を表示するものであり、特定の銘柄の売買を推奨するものではありません。投資の最終決定は、ご自身の判断と責任において行ってください。本ツールはベータ版であり、今後ロジックや機能が予告なく変更される場合があります。

【更新情報】
ver 3.1: レポート画面におけるSランク表示の不具合（ゴールドに表示されない）を修正しました。
ver 3.2:レポート機能のCSVエクスポートを更新し、ポートフォリオ管理サイト等へのインポートに適したデータ形式（分析結果のみ・日本語ヘッダー）に対応しました。
ver 3.3): レポート画面の操作性を大幅に改善しました。 ・「保存済みのレポートを表示」ボタンから、過去の分析結果に即座にアクセス可能。 ・画面上部にメニューを固定（Sticky Header）し、スクロール中も操作しやすくなりました。 ・ドロップダウンから特定の銘柄へ一瞬で移動できる「銘柄ジャンプ」機能を追加。 ・最新の分析結果が一番上に表示されるよう、デフォルトの並び順を改善。

Just a tab - Tab Manager & Duplicate Cleaner
All tabs in one page. One‑click duplicate cleanup. Save windows with tab groups. Page reminders.

See all your tabs at once, clean up duplicates safely, and save whole windows for later — now you can also save the current window directly from the extension popup. Smart default window names help you save faster, and you can delete saved windows anytime with a confirmation. Set page reminders with notes and get a New Tab prompt when it’s time.

Core features
- Tab Overview: see all tabs in one page, grouped by domain or Chrome tab group.
- Duplicate Cleanup: close duplicates in one click; hover highlights affected tabs before you act.
- Auto Duplicate Guard: if a URL is already open in the same window, switch to the existing tab instead of opening another one.
- Save & Reopen Windows: save the current window from the popup or New Tab page, with a smart suggested name (based on tab groups or top sites), preview its pages, reopen later with original tab groups and pinned tabs preserved. Delete saved windows with a confirmation when you no longer need them.
- Page Reminders (New): set a reminder for any page with optional notes; when it’s due, your New Tab shows a non-blocking prompt so you can open it or remind later.

Extras
- Settings menu: toggle auto duplicate guard and open the visit stats panel.
- Pinned favorites, sorting by recent/visits, visit stats, dark mode, live updates.

Privacy & Permissions
- Uses tabs, tabGroups, activeTab, storage; data stays local.

Keywords
tab manager, duplicate cleaner, window save/restore, saved windows, page reminders

Changelog

- 5.1.20 Saved windows improvements: save from popup; smart default names; delete saved windows with confirmation.
- 5.1.19 Page reminders: set reminders with notes; New Tab prompts when due; manage reminders.
- 5.1.18 UX improvements.
- 5.1.17 Saved window preview now groups tabs by domain and adds an “Open” button next to each tab title.
- 5.1.15 Save and name the current window; preview contents; reopen in a new window with original tab groups and pinned tabs preserved. Auto block duplicated tabs in the same window; settings menu with toggle and visit stats entry.

- 5.1.12 Supports different sorting orders.
- 5.1.11 Visit stats and UX improvements.
- 5.1.10 Dark mode style optimization.
- 5.1.9 Close tabs not visited for several days.
- 5.1.6 Reload data when switching back to New Tab; bug fixes.
- 5.1.5 One-click duplicate cleanup; view by Chrome tab groups; bug fixes.
- 5.1.3 Display URL pathname below each tab title.
- 5.1.4 / 5.1.1 Duplicate removal improvements; automatically close duplicated New Tabs.

一页看清所有标签，安全清理重复项，并支持保存/重开窗口（保留标签组与置顶）——现在也支持在插件 popup 弹窗里一键保存当前窗口。保存窗口时会自动生成更贴近内容的默认名称，减少命名负担；已保存窗口也支持删除（含二次确认）。设置页面提醒，可写备注，到时间在新标签页提示你回来处理。

核心功能
- 标签总览：一页看清所有标签，按域名或 Chrome 标签组分组。
- 去重清理：一键关闭重复标签；悬停高亮受影响标签，动作更可预期。
- 自动防重复：当你在同一窗口打开已存在的 URL 时，自动切换到已打开的标签，而不是再新开一个。
- 保存与重开窗口：支持在 popup 弹窗或新标签页保存当前窗口，并自动给出智能默认名称（优先基于标签组名，其次基于常见站点），支持预览；一键在新窗口重开，保留原有标签组与置顶标签。不需要时可删除已保存窗口（含二次确认）。
- 页面提醒（新功能）：为任意页面设置提醒并添加备注；到时间会在新标签页以非阻断提示的方式提醒你，可一键打开或稍后提醒。

补充能力
- 设置菜单：开关“自动防重复”功能，并从这里进入访问统计面板。
- 置顶常用、按最近/次数排序、访问统计、暗色主题、实时刷新。

隐私与权限
- 仅用 tabs、tabGroups、activeTab、storage；数据仅保存在本地。

Chrome Spotlight-Tabs, Bookmarks, History and More
A Spotlight-like search tool for Chrome

Chrome Spotlight is a Spotlight-like search tool for Chrome that allows you to quickly search through your open tabs, bookmarks, and browsing history using an intuitive command palette. It is designed to enhance your browsing productivity and make navigation across your browsing data faster and more efficient.
Easily toggle the Spotlight interface using Ctrl+K (or Command+K on macOS).

🌍 Type translate [text] to get instant translations without leaving your current tab
🕒 Use time to check the current time in different time zones (great for remote teams!)
🤖 Type aichat to start chatting with AI models like OpenAI or Gemini directly in the popup
➗ Run quick math operations like 10+100*4 right from the search bar
Some other core features:
🔍 Unified search across tabs, bookmarks, and history
⌨️ Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+K / Cmd+K to open anytime
🌐 Works seamlessly on all websites
⚙️ Customizable settings via the options page
The extension improves the browser's capabilities for working with bookmarks

The extension improves the browser's capabilities for working with bookmarks. 

* fast add bookmarks:
  * from selection in page.  
    Shortcut Ctrl+Shift+Period(dot) and context command.  
    Selection is used as folder name for new bookmark.  
    The extension is looking for folder (case and plural insensitive) or create new. 
  * from user input.  
    Shortcut Ctrl+Shift+Comma and context command.  
  * from last used list.  
    Last used list contains up to 50 last used folders.  
    Standard browser last used list contains only 5 items.  
    User can pin selected items in last used list.  
    User can delete bookmark using last used list. Click on tag second time.    
* extension shows existing bookmarks for active page in the right top corner.
* fast delete bookmark  
    Hover over bookmark and click small red button
* mark visited links in page
    turn on this option in settings 

Additional functionality for bookmarks
* User can hide bookmark labels by clicking on label.  
    To get access to buttons and links on the page under this labels
* Dated Bookmark Folders  
    Dated folders are folders that have "@D" at the end of their name.  
    When a user adds a bookmark to a dated folder "DONE @D", this extension replaces the @D with the actual date.  
    I use "DONE @D" to mark a list of news items or a list of author publications that I have finished  
    I use "Selected @D" to mark a page that I don't have time to rate right now.
* Option "Show author bookmarks with post bookmarks"  
    This feature implemented for dev.to, freecodecamp.org, linkedin.com, youtube.com and can be extended to other sites.
* Option 'Show bookmark title'.

Flat folder structure for bookmarks
The extension allows you to quickly switch to a flat folder structure for bookmarks.  
    The flat folder structure allows you to quickly find the desired folder since all  folders are on the first level and sorted.  
    In this mode on every browser start:  
       * folders with name starting with 'todo' are moved to root folder 'Bookmarks Toolbar'  
       * other folders are moved to root folder 'Other Bookmarks'  
       * nested folders are moved to root folder. Empty nested folders are deleted.  
       * folders are sorted  
       * folders with equal names (case and plural insensitive) are merged  
       * folders with not descriptive names (name starts with 'New folder', '[Folder Name]') are merged to 'Other bookmarks\zz-bookmark-info--unclassified'

Extra functionality  
* The extension clears url from search params on opening for defined sites.
* Command 'clear url from hash and all search params' in page context menu.
* Option 'Shows the previous visits'  
    User can distinguish between visited and new pages. New page don't have previous visits.
* Command 'Close duplicate tabs' in page context menu.
* Option 'Hide html-tags header, footer, aside, nav on printing.'.
* Option 'Hide page header for youtube channel'.
Bookmark History Manager PRO & share helper

A powerful Chrome extension designed to enhance your browsing experience by providing advanced bookmark and history management capabilities and search, along with innovative sharing features so you can share your bookmarks and history with others and quickly access them via your mobile phone.

Key Features:

1. Advanced Bookmark Management
- Advanced search and filtering capabilities
- Intelligent bookmark organization and categorization
- Quick access to frequently visited sites
- Customizable bookmark collections
- Favicon support for visual recognition
- Seamless integration with Chrome's native bookmarking system

2. Enhanced History Management
- Comprehensive browsing history management
- Advanced search and filtering capabilities
- Allow adding history items to bookmarks
- Top sites tracking for quick access

3. Smart Link Management & Sharing
- Automatic link description extraction from web pages
- Provide a QR code for each link so you can scan it quickly on your mobile phone

Stop wasting time. Toggle between "disabled" (no blocking), "Half focus" (Only block a given list of blocked sites), and "Full focus" (Block all sites except a given list of allowed sites).

If you enable the extension in incognito mode, "Full focus" mode is automatically enabled on while browsing in incognito.

You can also force search engines to only search on a single site, to avoid distracting sites appearing in search results.

This app does not track any metrics or show you any cool graphs. That would be distracting, which is not what this app is meant to be. It also cleans up after itself in your browser history, the "page blocked" page does not appear in your history, and neither does the page that was blocked.
Make web more context rich by enabling in-place context-specific previews for links

This extension enables live preview for:
- Fragment links (https://web.dev/text-fragments/)
- General preview for a set of allowlisted websites

For the same links it allows you to view them in a Sliding Panel mode.

Links in preview mode can be saved to Instapaper

Usage:
After installing the extension - supported links should get a `τ` indicator suffix to signify that this link has a preview.

To see the preview for a link, hover over the link with the `Alt` key pressed.
Click on the link with `Shift+Alt` keys pressed to open the link in the sliding pane view.

---
The extension also allows you to copy any page element's HTML to easily share a context rich representation of it. This part of extension is still work in progress though.
OCEAN - OneDevelopment CRM Environment And Navigation
Navigate between Blackbaud CRM environments seamlessly

A one-click CRM environment switcher with current page info, searchable history, link copy, and flexible "open-in..." actions.  OCEAN works with a popular enterprise fundraising software. 

Key features
Current page at a glance: Page title with a clear, color‑coded environment badge.
One‑click environment switcher: Dedicated, labeled buttons for your environments.
Searchable, filterable history: Quickly find recent CRM pages by title and environment.
Flexible “Open in…” actions: Use the dropdown to open pages the way you prefer.
Copy-friendly actions: Handy inline actions for fast sharing and navigation.
Thoughtful UI for small popups: Clean layout, responsive controls, and subtle status cues.

Who it’s for
CRM admins and power users who jump across environments
Developers and QA who validate changes in dev/test/prod
Support teams who need fast, reliable navigation
FuzzSearch - All-in-One Search for Tabs, Bookmarks & Page Content
Fuzzy search for tabs, bookmarks, and page content. Press Ctrl+Shift+F to open.

FuzzSearch is a macOS Spotlight-style productivity tool for Chrome that brings lightning-fast, fuzzy search to your entire browsing experience. Stop hunting through hundreds of tabs or deep bookmark folders—find exactly what you need with just a few keystrokes.

Key Features:
🔍 Ultra-Fast Fuzzy Search: Powered by Fuse.js, our search is typo-tolerant and understands URL parameters (e.g., searching for "?id=123").

📄 Deep Page Content Search: Search for text, headings, and links on the current page. It even identifies hidden links that aren't immediately visible.

📑 Instant Tab Swapping: Jump between dozens of open tabs instantly.

⭐ Global Bookmarks & History: Unified access to your complete bookmark collection and recent history.

⌨️ Keyboard-Centric UX: Designed for power users. Navigate, select, and open results without ever touching your mouse. (Ctrl+Shift+F)

🌐 Privacy First: All searching and processing happen locally on your machine. We never collect or transmit your data.

changelog:
v1.0.1: 
[fix] intercept keydown in capture phase to prevent page auto-focus conflict
Instant browser history search. Local AI via Ollama: live synonym expansion, per-keyword cache. 100% private. Zero cloud.

SmrutiCortex — Your private, lightning-fast browser memory search engine.

Tired of losing important pages in your browser history? SmrutiCortex indexes everything you visit and retrieves any URL in milliseconds. Think "Everything" search for Windows, but for your browser.

KEY FEATURES:

⚡ Ultra-Fast Search — Results appear as you type (< 50ms)
🎯 Smart Ranking — Recent + frequent results with literal substring boost
🎯 Strict Matching — Only shows results containing your search terms (default ON, configurable)
🎲 Diverse Results — Filters duplicate URLs automatically for variety (default ON, configurable)
⭐ Bookmark Search — Search bookmarks alongside history with ★ indicator
🔍 Query Expansion — Find related terms with synonym matching
🖼️ Favicon Caching — Local cache for fast icon loading
📊 Performance Monitor — Real-time search metrics and timing
🔧 Advanced Diagnostics — Export system info for bug reports
🔐 100% Private — All data stays local in IndexedDB
🛡️ Self-Healing — Auto-recovery from errors with retry logic
🔧 Privacy Controls — Favicon toggle, sensitive-site blacklist
💾 Data Management — Storage quota monitoring, one-click rebuild
⌨️ Keyboard-First — Ctrl+Shift+S instant access, full arrow key navigation
🎨 Clean UI — Minimal, distraction-free interface
🤖 AI Search — Optional local keyword expansion (Ollama)
🌐 Cross-Browser — Works on Chrome, Edge, and Firefox
🎓 Guided Onboarding — In-extension spotlight tour for new users
🔘 Toggle Chip Bar — Quick-toggle settings without opening settings modal
🔔 Toast Notifications — Hover-to-pause, selectable text for error messages
🎨 Theme Support — Dark, Light, or Auto (follows system preference)
📦 Data Portability — Export/import your entire search index
⎋ Smart Escape — First Esc clears input, second Esc closes
🔄 Zero-Reload Updates — Keyboard shortcut survives extension updates
🎛️ Command Palette — Universal browser control with prefix modes (/, >, @, #, ??, ?)
🌍 Web Search — Search Google, YouTube, GitHub, and more from the palette
🪟 Browser Commands — 45+ tab/window management commands (opt-in)
🔖 Recently Closed — Find and restore recently closed tabs from tab switcher
🔍 Boundary-Flex Matching — finds `module42` inside `Module 42`, `Module-42`, `module_42` (clean exact matches still rank first)
⚡ Warm-Cache Popup — instant first paint with cached recent history

PRIVACY GUARANTEE:

• All data stored locally on your device
• No cloud sync, no external servers
• No analytics, no tracking
• Optional favicon loading (configurable)
• Sensitive-site blacklist (banks, password managers)
• Source-available — inspect the code anytime (BSL-1.1, converts to Apache-2.0 in 2030)
• You can delete all data anytime

HOW IT WORKS:

1. Install extension
2. Browse normally — SmrutiCortex indexes your history automatically
3. Press Ctrl+Shift+S (or click icon) to search
4. Type anything — title, URL, keywords
5. Hit Enter to open

KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS:

• Ctrl+Shift+S: Open search
• Enter: Open result
• Ctrl+Enter: Open in new tab
• Shift+Enter: Open in background tab
• Arrow keys: Navigate results
• Esc: Clear search (first press), close (second press)
• Type "sc " in address bar for quick access

PREFIX MODES (in quick-search overlay):

• / — Everyday commands (sort, theme, toggles)
• > — Power commands (tab management, groups)
• @ — Switch to tab by title + recently closed tabs
• # — Search bookmarks
• ?? — Web search (Google, YouTube, GitHub, etc.)
• ? — Help and discovery

TECHNICAL DETAILS:

• Manifest V3 (future-proof)
• IndexedDB for fast local storage
• Modular scoring algorithms for intelligent ranking
• Service worker background processing
• TypeScript codebase for reliability
• 2,397+ unit tests + 56 E2E tests, coverage ratchet gated in pre-commit

SOURCE-AVAILABLE (BSL-1.1):
View code, report issues: github.com/dhruvinrsoni/smruti-cortex
Free for personal use. Converts to Apache-2.0 on April 1, 2030.

New in v9.4.1 (from v9.3.0):

• Instant results after typing — keyword results now fire once after you pause typing (respects your Focus Delay setting), not on every individual keystroke

• Independent AI + Semantic chips — the 🧠 Semantic chip no longer requires the 🤖 AI chip to be on; each chip directly toggles its own setting

• Result list stays visible when toggling AI/Semantic chips; Ctrl+C on a result copies the URL


New in v9.3.0:
• Recent history is now live — new visits appear in the popup without clicking "Index Now"
• Report bad rankings directly from the popup (rate-limited to 5 per 24 h)
• Smarter deduplication removes near-duplicate results across sub-domains

New in v9.2.0

Boundary-flex search matching — module42 now finds Module 42, Module-42, module_42
Warm-cache popup — instant first paint with cached recent history
Idle-resume re-init — service worker wakes proactively, eliminating cold-start delay
Battery-aware keep-alive — adaptive cadence that respects laptop battery
Hardened Ollama integration — exponential backoff + model-name canonicalization
Opt-in Semantic toolbar chip + Report Chooser modal
2,397 unit tests across 70 files + 70+ E2E tests across 11 specs
Adds one new permission: idle — used solely to wake the service worker. Grants no access to browsing data.

Reviewer fast-path: No new permissions, no new host permissions, no new data collection vs v9.1.0. This release adds boundary-flex search matching, warm-cache popup paint, opt-in Semantic chip, and MV3 reliability hardening (idle re-init, battery-aware keep-alive). All processing remains local; all data remains in IndexedDB.

• Ctrl+C copies a paste-ready URL for the Chrome omnibox

New in v9.3.0:
• Recent history is now live — new visits appear in the popup without clicking "Index Now"
• Report bad rankings directly from the popup (rate-limited to 5 per 24 h)
• Smarter deduplication removes near-duplicate results across sub-domains

v9.2.0 — Reliability + smarter search.

NEW: Boundary-flex matching — `module42` matches `Module 42`, `Module-42`, `module_42`, etc.
NEW: Warm-cache recent history — popup paints instantly on open.
NEW: Opt-in Semantic toolbar chip; Report chooser modal.

No new permissions. 100% local.

New in v9.0.0 (vs v8.1.0) — LTS Release
New permissions:
- sessions (required) — for recently closed tab search and restore in the @ tab-switcher mode
- windows (required) — for focusing the correct window when switching tabs from search results, and for Move Tab / Merge Windows commands
- tabGroups (optional) — for tab group management commands in the command palette
- browsingData (optional) — for browsing data cleanup commands in the command palette
- topSites (optional) — for showing most-visited sites in the command palette


New features:
- Command palette with 6 prefix modes (/, >, @, #, ??, ?)
- 45+ advanced browser commands for tab/window management (opt-in, behind optional permissions)

Bug fixes and stability:
- CSP compliance: moved inline error handler to external file
- Fixed message port closed warnings

The Game for your browser. Turn the internet into your gameboard, see browsing stats, and compete on the global high scores.

You've visited thousands of websites. What do you have to show for it?

Cheevos turns your daily browsing into a global competition. Every page you visit, file you download, and bookmark you save earns XP and unlocks achievements, building a rank that reflects how you actually use the internet.

Cheevos players have opened over 20,000 tabs and scrolled a combined 19 miles through the web. Every session adds to that.

Earn XP for what you already do
Every website visit, download, and bookmark counts. Watch your rank climb from Iron to Platinum as your real browsing habits are rewarded.

Unlock 100+ achievements across 10 categories
Navigation, Productivity, Time, Media, and more. Some achievements are obvious. Others are hidden: discover secret browser pages, rare milestones, and easter eggs most users never find.

Compete on global leaderboards
See where you rank against players worldwide. Live high scores update in real-time. Can you reach Diamond tier?

Browse with friends
Form a Party of up to 10 players, earn group XP, and compete in team challenges. Your squad's combined browsing builds a shared rank.

Works across Firefox and Chrome
Your XP, rank, and achievements sync across both browsers. Switch devices without losing your progress.

---
Privacy by Design — not just a tagline

All achievement logic runs entirely inside your browser. We never see your URLs, your history, or what you're reading. The only things that ever reach our servers are your XP total, your level, and your unlocked badge IDs — the minimum needed to power the leaderboard. Your raw browsing data stays on your machine, always.

You can delete your account and all synced data at any time from your dashboard.

---
Stop boring browsing. Install Cheevos and start playing the web.

---
Permissions — why we need them

We only request permissions that directly enable a specific feature. Here's exactly what each one does:

Browsing history and website activity
Required to detect achievement-triggering destinations — things like reaching a Wikipedia article, finding a hidden browser page, or completing a navigation milestone. We never store or sync your URLs. Instead, the extension creates a truncated one-way SHA-256 hash of each domain locally on your machine. The raw address is discarded immediately.

Bookmarks
Required for achievements tied to your curation habits — how many bookmarks you've saved, how long you've kept them, and how you organize them. Your folder names and URLs never leave your device.

Downloads
Required for achievements like Data Hoarder and Big Catch, which track cumulative download sizes and file counts. Filenames and URLs are processed locally and never synced.

Notifications
Used to announce achievement unlocks and major XP milestones in real-time. You can disable these in your browser's notification settings at any time.

---
That's it. No ad tracking, no behavioral profiling, no third-party data sharing. Just a game built on top of your existing browsing habits.
